# DTFformer Main-Experiment Results

# Task: long-term multivariate forecasting
# Configuration files: configs/common.yaml and configs/models/DTFformer.yaml
# Input length: 96
# Label length: 48
# Prediction lengths: 96, 192, 336, 720
# Repetitions: 3
# Main-experiment patch configuration: patch_len=16, stride=8
# Metrics: MSE and MAE (lower is better)
# Aggregation: mean and population standard deviation (ddof=0) over three runs
